name: Armor, +1
stat_impact: +1 bonus to AC

name: Shield, +1
stat_impact: +1 bonus to AC (Total +3)

name: Adamantine Armor
stat_impact: Crit Immunity: Any critical hit against you becomes a normal hit.

name: Mithral Armor
stat_impact: Removes Stealth Disadvantage and Strength requirements.

name: Armor of Resistance
stat_impact: Grants Resistance to one specific damage type.

name: Armor of Invulnerability
stat_impact: Resistance to all Non-Magical Damage; can grant 10 mins of Immunity.

name: Weapon, +1
stat_impact: +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls.

name: Flame Tongue
stat_impact: Bonus Action: Ignite for +2d6 fire damage on hits.

name: Sun Blade
stat_impact: +2 bonus to attack/damage; deals radiant damage; +1d8 vs Undead.

name: Holy Avenger
stat_impact: +3 bonus to attack/damage; +2d10 radiant vs Fiends/Undead; Aura of Adv on saves vs spells.

name: Vorpal Sword
stat_impact: +3 bonus to attack/damage; ignore resistance to slashing; decapitate on Nat 20.

name: Rod of the Pact Keeper, +1
stat_impact: Permanent: +1 bonus to Warlock spell attack rolls and spell save DC while held.

name: Immovable Rod
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Defies gravity when button is pressed.

name: Rod of Lordly Might
stat_impact: Permanent: While held, functions as a +3 magical weapon (form varies).

name: Staff of Power
stat_impact: Permanent: +2 bonus to AC, Saving Throws, and spell attack rolls. Functions as a +2 magical quarterstaff.

name: Staff of the Magi
stat_impact: Permanent: +2 bonus to spell attack rolls. Advantage on saving throws against spells.

name: Staff of Defense
stat_impact: Permanent: +1 bonus to AC while held.

name: Ring of Protection
stat_impact: Permanent: +1 bonus to AC and Saving Throws.

name: Ring of Resistance
stat_impact: Permanent: Resistance to one specific damage type.

name: Ring of Evasion
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Expend charges to succeed on failed Dexterity saving throws.

name: Wand of the War Mage, +1
stat_impact: Permanent: +1 bonus to spell attack rolls. Ignore half cover when making spell attacks.

name: Wand of Fireballs
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Can cast Fireball (DC 15) using charges.

name: Potion of Healing
stat_impact: Consumable: Restore 2d4 + 2 hit points.

name: Potion of Giant Strength (Hill)
stat_impact: Consumable: Permanent: Strength becomes 21 for 1 hour.

name: Spell Scroll (3rd Level)
stat_impact: Consumable: Cast a 3rd-level spell once (Save DC 15, Attack +7).

name: Nether Scroll of Azumar
stat_impact: Permanent: Reading for 50 hours grants permanent +2 to Intelligence (max 22).

name: Amulet of Health
stat_impact: Permanent: Constitution score becomes 19.

name: Bag of Holding
stat_impact: Utility: Can hold up to 500 lbs in a demiplane.

name: Headband of Intellect
stat_impact: Permanent: Intelligence score becomes 19.

name: Manual of Gainful Exercise
stat_impact: Permanent: Strength score and maximum increase by 2.
